summary: OTP SMS delivery delays on Vi and JIO carriers
description:
Login OTP SMS messages are delayed by 30-90 seconds on Vi (formerly Vodafone Idea) and occasionally 1-2 minutes on JIO during peak hours. Users frequently retry, multiplying their OTP requests and worsening the queue.

Proposed fix: after 45 seconds with no delivery confirmation, automatically retry via a secondary carrier route. Email-OTP fallback already exists but discovery is poor.
